channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A07 - W17A04 - W17A03 - W17A02 - W17A01 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 23:30 UTC  -  Jul 3, 02:30 UTC

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in GRA1.

List of concerned racks :
- G107A04
- G107A05
- G107A06
- G107A08
- G107A09
- G107A11
- G107A12
- G107A13
- G107A14
- G107A15
- G107B04
- G107B07
- G107B08
- G107B11
- G107B14
- G107B15
- G108A03
- G108A04
- G122B12
- G122B13
- G122B14
- G122B15

Start time : 02/07/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 02:30 UTC
Service impact : Network disruption and temporary loss of vRack access may occur during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be performing maintenance on a network device.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Infrastructure] - Rack G263B14 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in Rack G263B14.

Start time : 30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM][Storage and Backups] - Enterprise File Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 05:00 - 11:00 UTC

Jun 15, 15:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Storage and Backups offer.

Start time : 30/06/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : Some Storage Enterprise File Storage services used with vRack Services will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 1 minute during the maintenance period.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Storage infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46N07 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 22, 09:06 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack 46N07.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 05:54 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack 46N07 are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 45D37 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 22, 03:26 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack 45D37 has been resolved.

Start time : 22/06/2026 01:32 UTC
End time : 22/06/2026 03:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 22, 03:00 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack 45D37.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 01:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The majority of the servers in the rack 45D37 are no longer impacted.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 22, 01:41 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary issue in the rack 45D37.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 01:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 45D37 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 09:43 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Virtual Private Servers offer in the GRA region which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 07:28 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 07:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region were temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Storage and Backups] - Block Storage incident notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 05:14 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Block Storage offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 04:48 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 04:54 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The block storage service was temporarily unavailable for some customers.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their storage located in GRA regions.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Room G124B/G125B notification incident
item.description:
Jun 21, 00:22 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 20/06/2026 20:19 UTC
End time : 20/06/2026 21:10 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 20, 21:38 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 20/06/2026 21:10 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/06/2026 20:19 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network was temporarily unavailable in the specified room.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access and use their servers through public network.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 20, 21:02 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the specified room.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 20/06/2026 20:19 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The public network may be temporarily unavailable in the specified room.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through public network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A15/18 and L104B03/08/09 maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 21:11 UTC
Completed - The maintenance has been postponed and will be re-scheduled.

Jun 4, 13:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09.

Start time : 25/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09 to L104B02/B06.

Thank you for your understanding.
